C.label: Substitute implausible wichita UC/RHYTHMIC at mkStn (era→CHR/AC/Classic Hits/Gospel)

D.label: Tier inject: drop urban slots for small + blackPop<0.15

recommendation.primaryMechanism: National timeline rival-URBAN_CONTEMP (1983) launches via rival- handler without formatAllowedInMarket gate — adds FM UC at gen/early sim (entryTurn 1985p2 in trace). Second source: tier-market inject URBAN_CONTEMP (TIER_MARKET_INJECT_BP index 4) fills small-market commercial slots at gen (launchPeriod -999). SOUL_RNB is remapped to COUNTRY/GOSPEL on wichita dial; 2026 URBAN family is 100% URBAN_CONTEMP (SOUL/RHYTHMIC ~0).
recommendation.wichitaBlueprint: MARKET_BP_PATCH does not seed UC; dialBpAmToFm maps national SOUL AM slots to COUNTRY/GOSPEL FM.

variantFindings.B: Partial: blocks inject + post-unlock rivals using formatAllowed — 2026 UC 16.2%→9.1%; does not remove gen rival UC.
variantFindings.C: Full wichita-only remap at mkStn — 2026 URBAN 0%; controls unchanged.
variantFindings.D: No effect vs A — UC enters via national rival path, not tier-inject list alone.
variantFindings.E: Same as C for wichita; controls unchanged.

recommendation.bestMinimalFix: Ship: (1) gate rival-URBAN_CONTEMP/RHYTHMIC in processNationalTimeline for rankTier small + blackPop<0.15; (2) formatAllowedInMarket suppression (variant B); (3) filter TIER_MARKET_INJECT_BP urban slots for same cohort. Avoid wichita-only mkStn remap (C).
recommendation.scope: Generalize to small low-Black markets (not Wichita-only). Atlanta/NY/Phoenix controls flat under E because patches target small/blackPop<0.15 or wichita id.
recommendation.noteOn19pct: This harness mean @2026 URBAN fam ≈16.2% (8 runs). Prior family-bucket diag ~19–20% may differ by run count/seed or lifecycle rollup — same dominant mechanism (URBAN_CONTEMP).
